description: A customer reports that the electric meter box on the side of their house is damaged.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer's account and address.
Explain that while the meter itself belongs to the utility, the meter box (enclosure) is typically the homeowner's responsibility to repair.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the ownership and responsibility policy.

nodes.task_description: Advise the customer to hire a qualified electrician to make the repairs and provide instructions for scheduling a temporary disconnection for safety during the repair.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides helpful advice and creates a disconnect/reconnect service order.
